name: Schema Request

---

## Cloud Provider
- [ ] AWS
- [ ] Azure
- [ ] GCP

## Resource Type
Name of the resource (e.g., AWS RDS, Azure Container Apps, GCP Cloud Run).

## Terraform Module
Link to the upstream Terraform module (if applicable).

## Key Variables
List the most important variables that should be included as basic inputs.

## Use Case
Describe your use case for this resource.
